resources.string: Vula izici ezengeziwe futhi ube ngumnikazi ukuze usekele ukuthuthukiswa okuqhubekayo!
SD Maid ayinayo izikhangiso futhi ayithengisi idatha yabasebenzisi. Ukuthuthukiswa okuqhubekayo kwenzeka kuphela ngawe.
Yiba ngumnikazi futhi uxhase ukuthuthukiswa! Thepha inkinobho engezansi ukuze unike amandla zonke izici ezengeziwe futhi uvule iphrofayili yami ye-GitHub Sponsors.

• Ukulungisa i-cache nokususa izifo
• Ukususa amafayela angelezele
• Ukucithisa izithombe nokuvidiyo
• Ukunakha amafayela andala ngokudonsela
• Ukulungisa ngesisindo sisodwa nge-widget
• Ukubeka isicwajiso sokucitsha
• Izigali nezihlaka ezenzakelelile
• Imikhuba yesitoreji nehistori
• Izici eziningi nokulawula kumaphutha kohlelo
• Ukusekela umsebenzi we-open-source
Enye indlela izikhangiso, ukuhlaziya ne-Google Play 🙁
Usuyabuyela? Ukusekela kwakho kugcina i-SD Maid iphila!
Usebenzisa inguqulo yamahhala ye-SD Maid. Izici zokwengeziwe zingavulwa ngokusekela ukuthuthukiswa.
Zonke izici zokwengeziwe zivuliwe. Ngiyabonga ekusekeni ukuthuthukiswa kwe-open-source ❤️
SD Maid izongezeleke nge-updates ne-fixes. Uma uthanda ukubulela lokho, cabanga nge-donasioni emuva-muva nge-GitHub Sponsors.
